description: A B2B e-commerce site wants to hide product pricing for all users who are not logged in to a verified business account.

nodes.task_description: Apply a rule to the product template that checks the user's authentication status.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly configures the display logic.

nodes.task_description: If the user is logged out, display a 'Log in to see price' message instead of the price.

expected_outcome.value: The rule is correctly implemented to hide the price and show a message.

nodes.task_description: If the user is logged in, display the price as normal.

expected_outcome.value: The rule correctly shows the price for authenticated users.
